name: ryan-reynolds-physique-tracker
description: Personal 16-week Ryan Reynolds aesthetic transformation tracker (Navin - Phase 1)

scripts.setup: npm install && (cd server && npm install) && (cd client && npm install)
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.render-build: cd server && npm install --no-package-lock && cd ../client && npm install --include=dev --no-package-lock && npm run build
scripts.start: npm run build && npm --prefix server start
